title: Fix sign out option and preserve complaints on account deletion

requirements.text: Fix the sign out (logout) functionality in both AppHeader.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so that clicking the logout/sign out option correctly terminates the user session, clears relevant app state, and redirects the user to the landing page without errors.

quotes: fix the error of sign out options

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the sign out option in the header dropdown successfully logs the user out via Internet Identity.
Clicking the sign out option in the sidebar successfully logs the user out via Internet Identity.
After sign out, the user is redirected to the landing/login page.
No console errors occur during the sign out flow.
App state (profile, notifications, role) is cleared after sign out.

requirements.text: Update the backend account deletion logic in backend/main.mo so that when a user profile is deleted, the user's complaints remain in the system and are NOT removed. Complaints should be preserved and remain accessible to HOD/admin after the submitting account is deleted.

quotes: if the account deleted the complaints remains not deleted
ensure complaints are not deleted when an account is removed

acceptanceCriteria: Deleting a user account via the deleteProfile (or equivalent) backend function does not delete that user's associated complaints.
Complaints submitted by a deleted account remain visible to HOD and admin roles in the complaints list.
The complaint data (title, description, status, priority, category) is fully intact after the submitter's account is deleted.

requirements.text: Update DeleteAccountDialog.tsx so that after account deletion, it only clears the user's own profile-related localStorage keys and does NOT delete complaint metadata stored in localComplaintStore for complaints submitted by that user.

quotes: if the account deleted the complaints remains not deleted
ensure complaints are not deleted when an account is removed

acceptanceCriteria: After account deletion, complaint metadata in localStorage (categories, departments, media references, feedback) is preserved.
Only user profile-specific localStorage keys are cleared on account deletion.
Emergency alert and notification localStorage entries unrelated to the deleted user are not affected.

constraints: Do not change complaint data models or existing complaint CRUD endpoints beyond removing any cascade-delete behavior tied to user accounts.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Reassigning complaint ownership to another user after account deletion.
Adding any new complaint or user management features.
Changes to the emergency alert notification system.
